query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: An outdoor plaza featuring ornate street lamps mounted on stone and metal poles arranged throughout a paved pedestrian area. Empty benches sit near the center of the space, while a tall multi-story building rises on the left side and a low-rise building with a flat roof spans the background. A large cylindrical concrete column stands prominently in the right foreground, and the sky above is filled with heavy cloud cover. The scene contains no visible people.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A muted, sepia-toned photograph of an outdoor plaza rendered in a desaturated monotone palette with low vibrancy and retro faded brown tones. Ornate street lamps mounted on stone and metal poles cast light across the paved pedestrian area, where empty benches sit near the center. A tall multi-story building rises on the left, a low-rise building with a flat roof spans the background, and a large cylindrical concrete column stands prominently in the right foreground beneath an overcast sky. The empty scene conveys a quiet, melancholic atmosphere.
